seo.title: Midjourney Blend Image Mixer | Try Midjourney Blend Online
seo.description: Midjourney Blend combines 2-5 images into new AI-generated artwork. Mix styles, merge concepts, and create unique compositions. Try blend mode free online.

hero.headline: Combine Multiple Images into **Seamless AI Compositions**
hero.tagline: Midjourney's tool for blending visual concepts into unified generated images
hero.description: Midjourney Blend merges 2-5 images into cohesive AI-generated compositions. Upload reference images, and the model analyzes their visual elements—color palettes, textures, subjects, and styles—to create unified outputs. Ideal for concept exploration, style fusion, and creative experimentation. Works within Midjourney's Discord interface with simple commands, delivering results that combine the essence of your source materials into original imagery.
hero.name: Midjourney Blend

steps.title: Three steps from idea to blended image
steps.description: Combine multiple images seamlessly with Midjourney Blend's intelligent merging system to create unique visual compositions in minutes.

items.title: Upload your source images
items.description: Select Midjourney Blend and upload two to five images you want to merge. The model accepts JPG, PNG, and WebP formats up to 25MB each.
items.image_prompt: Clean UI screenshot showing Midjourney Blend interface with a file upload area displaying 3 thumbnail images being dragged in. Modern card-based layout with 'Select Images' button, supported format indicators, and model selector dropdown at top. Light mode interface with purple accent colors.

items.title: Adjust blend settings and style
items.description: Configure blend intensity, aspect ratio, and style parameters. Control how strongly each image influences the final result using intuitive weight sliders for precise control.
items.image_prompt: UI screenshot showing parameter panel with blend intensity slider at 75%, aspect ratio selector showing 16:9 selected, and three image weight sliders at different levels. Style preset dropdown expanded showing options like 'Natural', 'Artistic', 'Dramatic'. Preview thumbnails of source images on the left side.

items.title: Generate and download your blend
items.description: Click generate to create your blended image. Preview the result, make adjustments if needed, then download in your preferred format and resolution for immediate use.
items.image_prompt: UI screenshot displaying a large preview of a successfully blended artistic image in the center, with 'Download' and 'Regenerate' buttons below. Format selector showing PNG/JPG/WebP options and resolution dropdown showing HD/4K options. Generation progress indicator showing completed. Small thumbnails of source images in sidebar for reference.

capabilities.title: What sets Midjourney Blend apart
capabilities.description: Midjourney Blend combines multiple images into cohesive compositions using advanced diffusion techniques. It analyzes visual elements from 2-5 source images and merges them seamlessly, preserving style consistency while creating entirely new outputs. Perfect for concept exploration and creative iteration.

items.title: Merge concepts without visible seams
items.description: Blend analyzes color palettes, lighting conditions, and compositional elements from source images to create unified outputs. The model intelligently balances contributions from each input, maintaining visual coherence across the merged result.
items.image_prompt: Split screen showing three diverse source images (portrait, landscape, abstract) on left merging into single cohesive blended image on right, with flowing transition effect, professional photography style, 8k resolution

items.title: Apply artistic styles across different subjects
items.description: Extract stylistic elements from one image and apply them to another's composition. Blend separates content from style attributes, allowing precise control over artistic direction while maintaining subject integrity and recognizability.
items.image_prompt: Before and after comparison: realistic photograph of architecture transformed with oil painting texture and impressionist color palette, side by side layout, vibrant artistic rendering, museum quality

items.title: Generate variations from multiple references
items.description: Combine disparate visual concepts to discover unexpected creative directions. Blend's diffusion process creates novel interpretations by finding latent connections between inputs, accelerating ideation workflows for designers and artists.
items.image_prompt: Grid of four source images (nature, technology, fashion, architecture) with arrows pointing to center showing multiple blended variations, creative studio workspace aesthetic, high contrast, professional mockup style

items.title: Precise influence over blending outcomes
items.description: Adjust the contribution level of each source image through weighted blending parameters. This granular control lets you emphasize specific elements, creating outputs that range from subtle influences to dominant features from your chosen references.
items.image_prompt: Interface mockup showing slider controls adjusting blend percentages between three images, with live preview updating in real-time, clean modern UI design, professional software screenshot aesthetic

faq.question: What is Midjourney Blend and what does it do?
faq.answer: Midjourney Blend is a feature that combines 2-5 images to create new AI-generated artwork. It analyzes the visual concepts, styles, and elements from your uploaded images and merges them into a single cohesive result using Midjourney's generative AI.

faq.question: Is Midjourney Blend free to use?
faq.answer: Midjourney Blend is not available on a free tier. It requires a paid Midjourney subscription starting at $10/month for the Basic plan. Each blend operation consumes GPU time from your subscription's monthly allocation, similar to standard image generation.

faq.question: How does Midjourney Blend compare to other image blending tools?
faq.answer: Unlike simple photo blending apps that overlay or fade images, Midjourney Blend uses AI to understand and synthesize concepts from multiple images. It creates entirely new compositions rather than just layering, producing more creative and unpredictable artistic results than traditional editing software.

faq.question: How do I use the Blend feature in Midjourney?
faq.answer: Type /blend in Discord, then upload 2-5 images when prompted. Midjourney processes them automatically without needing text prompts. You can optionally adjust dimensions and add suffixes. The AI generates blended results within 30-60 seconds, depending on server load.

faq.question: Can I control which elements from each image appear in the blend?
faq.answer: Midjourney Blend doesn't offer granular control over which specific elements appear. The AI interprets all images holistically and decides how to merge them. For more control, use standard /imagine prompts with image URLs and descriptive text instead of the blend command.

bottomCta.title: Start Blending Images with Midjourney Today
bottomCta.description: Combine multiple images into seamless compositions using Midjourney's blend feature. Create unique visual mashups in seconds with AI-powered image merging technology.
